home.headline:
Collective minds.
Real solutions.
home.subheading: HiveCollective is where communities come together to name the problems that hold them back — and build solutions, together.

problems.title: Problems
problems.beFirst: Be the first to post one
problems.signUpToPost: Sign up to post the first problem.

problemDetail.noGroups: No groups yet — be the first to organise around this problem.
problemDetail.beFirstSolution: Be the first to propose one
problemDetail.signUpSolution: Sign up to propose a solution.

postProblem.title: Post a problem
postProblem.subtitle: Describe a real challenge affecting your community, country, or region. Focus on societal problems — not personal ones.
postProblem.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Lack of clean drinking water in rural areas
postProblem.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the problem in detail. Who does it affect? What are the consequences? What has been tried before?

postSolution.title: Propose a solution
postSolution.subtitle: Describe your solution clearly. What should be done, by whom, and how? Focus on practical, actionable steps.

auth.joinSubtitle: Create an account to post problems, propose solutions, and join groups.

createGroup.title: Create a group
createGroup.subtitle: Groups bring people together around a specific problem. As the creator you become the moderator.
createGroup.name: Group name
createGroup.namePlaceholder: e.g. Clean Water Action Group — Ghana
createGroup.descriptionPlaceholder: What is this group trying to achieve? Who should join?

errors.signInRequired: You need to be signed in.
